security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Cross-platform desktop dashboard for managing GitHub pull requests.
bundle.longDescription: PRism is a local-first desktop app that watches every pull request you care about across repos, orgs, and GitHub accounts. V1 is read-only: PRism observes and surfaces state; all writes happen on GitHub itself.
